ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent it [i.e., the Qur’ān] down during the Night of Decree.
And what can make you know what is the Night of Decree?

ayahs.arabic: لَيْلَةُ ٱلْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
ayahs.translation: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.
ayahs.transliteration: Laylatu alqadri khayrun min alfi shahr

ayahs.arabic: تَنَزَّلُ ٱلْمَلَـٰٓئِكَةُ وَٱلرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
ayahs.translation: The angels and the Spirit [i.e., Gabriel] descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.
ayahs.transliteration: Tanazzalu almala-ikatu warroohufeeha bi-ithni rabbihim min kulli amr

ayahs.translation: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.
